design_philosophy.identity: The Closer - A high-velocity tool for real estate wholesalers who need instant, accurate numbers.
core_principles: Speed is Safety: Every microsecond of latency is a lost deal. Instant calculations.
Data Brutalism: Big numbers, high contrast, no decorative fluff.
Tactile Inputs: Inputs should feel like physical machinery. Heavy focus states, distinct active states.
Orange is Action: Orange is not just a brand color; it is the signal for 'Money' and 'Action'.
design_philosophy.mood_board: Construction Safety Equipment meets Swiss Finance App. High visibility, rugged utility, precise typography.

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chivo:wght@400;700;900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500&display=swap');

gradients.none: No gradients allowed. Solid, confident colors only.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF7A00] text-white hover:bg-[#E66E00] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(26,26,26,1)] active:shadow-none active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A1A1A] border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-gray-50 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(26,26,26,1)] active:shadow-none active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 transition-all

inputs.default: bg-[#FFE6CC] border-2 border-transparent focus:border-[#FF7A00] focus:ring-0 text-[#1A1A1A] font-medium placeholder:text-[#1A1A1A]/50 text-lg py-6 px-4 rounded-md transition-all shadow-inner
inputs.label: text-[#1A1A1A] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs mb-2 block

cards.result: bg-white border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] p-8 relative overflow-hidden
cards.input_group: bg-white border border-gray-200 p-6 md:p-8 rounded-xl shadow-sm

deal_score.container: flex items-center gap-2 font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-2xl

header.style: border-b-2 border-[#1A1A1A] bg-white sticky top-0 z-50

main.desktop: max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 pt-12 pb-24 px-4

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on Orange (#FF7A00) is White or Black (Check APCA). Small text on Orange MUST be Black.
accessibility.focus_states: Focus rings must be visible (2px solid black or blue).
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the primary button. Solid Orange.
Inputs must have a 'Light Orange' (#FFE6CC) background as per user request.
Results must be LARGE. The MAO (Max Allowable Offer) is the hero.
Use 'Chivo' font for all numbers to give them weight.
The 'Save Deal' feature should use local storage.
Mobile layout: Sticky 'Calculate/Result' bar at the bottom if the form is long.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup Tailwind config with custom colors (Orange #FF7A00, Light Orange #FFE6CC) and fonts (Chivo, Inter).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create the 'ResultCard' component first - it's the visual anchor.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the 'InputGroup' component with the specific Light Orange background style.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the calculation logic in a custom hook 'useDealCalculator'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Assemble the main page: Split view on Desktop, Stacked on Mobile.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Add the 'Export to PDF' using 'jspdf' and 'html2canvas' (or similar lightweight lib).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Ensure the 'Deal Score' logic (Green/Yellow/Red) dynamically updates the Result Card border or accent.
